# Security Policy

## Reporting a vulnerability

If you discover a security issue, please open an issue in this repository with the label `security`.
If you need to share sensitive information, please send it privately via email to `arunkumarcool324@gmail.com`.

## Supported versions

This project supports the current release and the previous Python minor version.

## Security practices

- Keep dependencies up to date with Dependabot
- Avoid committing credentials or secrets
- Use IAM roles and policies for AWS access
